changelog: T6: Global Toast notification system — success/error/warning/info types, 3.5s auto-dismiss, top-slide animation
T6: Toast container hoisted to App root — all routes (login, device detail, main) can now trigger toasts
T19: WebSocket real-time push with auto-reconnect and heartbeat
T23: Offline command queue with auto-replay on network restore
T25: QR Code scanner hook (BarcodeDetector API + fallback)
T26: Unified connection status hook + ConnectionIndicator component
